form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 0.8 lengths at this track (30.22) beating Canya Flavour in a Grade 5 on April 12 four days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 366m at Capalaba by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Can continue his winning ways.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Into the 1st turn made heavy contact with the running rail.

form.formComment: Has finished in the money at his last three runs, the latest when third (30.25) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Deserves respect.
